caption: A man is shown in a static shot, wearing a traditional dark patterned hat, a blue shirt, a red-and-black striped robe, and long red beaded necklaces. He has glasses on and is holding his right hand up to his face, touching the frame of his glasses. To his right, a blurry portion of his red-and-black robe is visible. The background is a plain, light-colored wall. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and pose. Various graphic overlays appear on the screen, including a "plus tv" logo in the upper left and a banner at the bottom. The text on the banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a smaller bar indicates where to "WATCH ON" with logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". The scene remains unchanged across the frames.
